title: Automations to email
excerpt: I am newer to Monday.com.  I am looking to create a form and when the form is completed and email sent to internal employees.  Is that a possibility or does Monday.com want the notifications to stay internal using Monday…

posts.author: Tate.Bailey (Tate)
posts.cookedHtml: I am newer to Monday.com. I am looking to create a form and when the form is completed and email sent to internal employees. Is that a possibility or does Monday.com want the notifications to stay internal using Monday.com

posts.author: christoffer (Christoffer Baadsgaard)
posts.cookedHtml: @Tate.Bailey are you going to create the form with Monday.com or do you have the form in an external application?

posts.author: EDCO (Emma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am quite new to Monday.com and have just stumbled across this question. If I do create a form using Monday.com how would I turn on an email alert for when the form has been filled out?
Thank you in advance
